title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners:
NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners!
